message:
fix(codegen): Skip empty block stub expressions

Empty block expressions {} from stub implementations (e.g., codecs.register_error)
are invalid Zig syntax and cause compile errors when followed by semicolons.

Detection: Trim whitespace and check if expression is exactly {}
Fix: Skip generating the statement entirely for empty block stubs

Fixes compile error in test_codeccallbacks: expected statement, found semicolon
Before: {} ; (invalid)
After: (statement skipped entirely)
